description: GitHub-style emoji reaction picker. Persistent bar of reaction chips with counts + a trigger that opens a curated palette popover. Composes pop-over for the palette surface.

attributes.name: data-trigger-icon
attributes.description: Text/emoji content of the trigger button (default "😀")

attributes.name: data-disabled
attributes.description: Read-only mode — chips don't toggle, trigger is disabled

events.name: reaction-bar:toggle
events.description: Fires when a chip or palette option is clicked. detail: { reaction, action: 'add'|'remove', count, mine }

events.name: reaction-bar:palette-open
events.description: Fires when the palette popover opens

events.name: reaction-bar:palette-close
events.description: Fires when the palette popover closes

childAttributes.name: data-reaction
childAttributes.description: Stable identifier sent to the backend (e.g. thumbsup, heart)

childAttributes.name: data-count
childAttributes.description: Current count (≥ 1 to show; 0 removes the chip)

childAttributes.name: data-mine
childAttributes.description: Whether the current user has this reaction

childAttributes.name: data-palette
childAttributes.description: Marks a <template> child as the available-reactions palette
